message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Already reviewed and approved, confirmed">
Already reviewed all three templates and the CSS -- my approval message was sent before this one arrived. No blocking issues. The visual design is clean and consistent with the established patterns. You have my consensus approval.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks, Steve. Your approval is confirmed and noted.

Current status: waiting on Scott (to verify his renames are in the code), Lea (to confirm her 3 blockers are resolved), and Heydon (to confirm his specific blocking items).
